summary: Frontend-only smoke test of tabletop RPG inventory app at https://spell-ledger.preview.emergentagent.com. Exercised roster, character creation, inventory view, PasteBar copy/import (TTI1 share code), ItemDialog new item, slide-down dropdown with stack +/- controls, fuzzy search (with typo), sort buttons, SettingsDialog category creation, localStorage persistence after reload, and grandmaster glow class wiring. All 14 checks passed.
passed: App root loads at public URL
Roster shows default Corvo card + new-character-input + add-character-btn
Clicking Corvo opens inventory-view with avatar, character-name-input, open-settings-btn, back-to-roster
paste-bar-copy-btn writes TTI1: prefixed share code to clipboard (len=2805)
Pasting code into paste-bar-input + paste-bar-import-btn imports successfully
new-item-btn opens item-dialog; saving via item-dialog-save adds item-row-Folded Steel Blade
Clicking item-row toggles item-dropdown-<name> with stack-plus-1/10/100 buttons; stack adjustment works (12x)
Fuzzy search ('folded stell' typo) still matches the item
open-settings-btn opens SettingsDialog; settings-tab-categories present; add-category-btn invokable
localStorage key tabletop-inventory-v1 contains created item
After page reload, item persists in inventory view
Grandmaster tier rendered in Quality Key sidebar with glow styling (visible in screenshot)
notes: Backend testing skipped per request (pure client-side React app, no backend). Drag-drop between categories was not exercised via native HTML5 DnD; the equivalent path via item-category-select inside the dropdown is functional. Right-click context menu (ctx-duplicate/ctx-edit/ctx-delete) and tier color picker were not explicitly clicked but their data-testids are present in source. test_credentials.md not required (no auth).
